This complete 25-hour bundle provides everything you need to pass both the CompTIA A+ Core 1 and Core 2 exams, covering hardware, software, networking, security, and operational procedures.

✅ Master PC hardware, from motherboards and CPUs to storage and peripherals, and learn to troubleshoot common hardware issues.

✅ Understand the fundamentals of networking, including installing and configuring networks, and grasp the basics of virtualization and cloud computing.

✅ Install, configure, and troubleshoot a wide range of operating systems, including Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android.

✅ Learn to identify and mitigate security threats and understand best practices for operational procedures and professional communication.

Whether you're aiming for your first job at a help desk, as a field technician, or in desktop support, this comprehensive program is the most direct path to the certification you need to get hired.

Includes 25+ hours of content and 10 full-length practice exams. Everything you need to study, practice, and pass.

If you're ready to stop waiting and start building your future in IT, the ultimate A+ preparation is right here. Your new career is one click away.

databricks_dataengineerassociate_10pract.human_name: Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate Exam Preparation with 10 Practice Exams
databricks_dataengineerassociate_10pract.description_text:
The Databricks Data Engineer Associate exam tests whether you can build and manage data pipelines in the Lakehouse, and this course prepares you for every part of it.

From Spark ELT to production pipelines and governance, you'll cover the full associate-level scope.

► Advanced Lakehouse Architecture Concepts

► Apache Spark ELT Mastery for real data workflows

► Delta Lake and Incremental Processing techniques

► Production Pipeline Development and Governance

✔️ Lifetime access to all modules

✔️ 10 practice exams with unlimited attempts

The Associate is the starting point for a Databricks engineering career. This course gets you there with a thorough, structured approach.

Begin your Databricks engineering path. Enroll now.

pythonsoftwarefoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Python Software Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The mission of the Python Software Foundation is to promote, protect, and advance the Python programming language, and to support and facilitate the growth of a diverse and international community of Python programmers. The majority of the PSF's work is focused on empowering and supporting people within the Python community. The PSF has active grant programs that support sprints, conferences, meetups, user groups, and Python development efforts all over the world. In addition, the PSF underwrites and runs PyCon US, the primary Python community conference. Being part of the PSF means being part of the Python community. Recently we changed the PSF to an open membership organization, so that everyone who uses and supports Python can join. To learn more, visit https://www.python.org/psf/membership.

osth_offsecthreathunter_10practiceexams.human_name: OffSec Threat Hunter (OSTH) Certification with 10 Practice Exams
osth_offsecthreathunter_10practiceexams.description_text:
Automated alerts can only catch known threats. What about the adversaries who are already inside your network, moving silently? The OffSec Threat Hunter goes looking for them. This is proactive defense.

Learn to proactively identify and investigate potential intrusions by developing data-driven hypotheses, analyzing system and network artifacts, and tracking adversary TTPs (Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures).

✅ Understand how to leverage enterprise data sources—from endpoint logs and network traffic to memory analysis—to form a basis for your hunts.

✅ Learn to develop threat hypotheses based on common adversary behaviors and use them to conduct targeted searches for indicators of compromise.

✅ Go beyond simple indicators by learning to recognize and analyze attacker Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures (TTPs).

✅ Master the investigative workflow, from initial discovery and scoping of an incident to documenting and communicating your findings.

This advanced program is designed for experienced security professionals, such as SOC analysts and incident responders, who are ready to evolve from reactive defense to proactive hunting.

Includes 10 Practice Exam. Form your hypothesis. Follow the trail. Find the adversary.

If you're ready to stop waiting for alerts and start actively hunting down threats, this is your field guide to proactive defense.

klcp_kalilinuxcertifiedprofessional_10pr.human_name: OffSec Kali Linux Certified Professional (KLCP) Certification with 10 Practice Exams
klcp_kalilinuxcertifiedprofessional_10pr.description_text:
Learn to professionally manage, customize, and troubleshoot the Kali Linux environment, ensuring you have a stable, performant, and optimized platform for all your security assessment work.

✅ Master Kali Linux system administration, including managing services, users, permissions, and the underlying Debian package management system.

✅ Learn to customize and re-build the Kali Linux ISO, creating tailored versions of the OS for specific engagement needs.

✅ Go beyond apt install: learn to compile tools from source, manage different versions of tools, and ensure your toolkit is always ready.

✅ Automate common tasks and streamline your workflow with Bash scripting and a deep understanding of the Kali environment.

Before you learn to attack the targets, you must first master your own system. This certification is the logical starting point for anyone pursuing advanced OffSec certifications like the OSCP.

Includes 10 Practice Exam. Configure the system. Customize the tools. Command the OS.

Don't let your OS be a barrier to your success. If you're ready to build a deep, professional mastery of your primary security toolkit, this is your official guide.

oswa_offsecwebassessor_10practiceexams.human_name: OffSec Web Assessor (OSWA) Certification with 10 Practice Exams
oswa_offsecwebassessor_10practiceexams.description_text:
This program teaches you the manual, methodical process of assessing modern web applications to uncover the critical vulnerabilities that put businesses at risk.

Master the end-to-end workflow of a web application penetration tester, from reconnaissance and mapping to identifying, exploiting, and reporting on a wide range of common vulnerabilities.

✅ Learn to perform thorough reconnaissance and application mapping to understand the target's attack surface and technology stack.

✅ Master techniques to identify and exploit various injection vulnerabilities, including SQL Injection, NoSQL Injection, and Command Injection.

✅ Explore common client-side vulnerabilities like Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF), and insecure session management.

✅ Learn to uncover and exploit broken access control mechanisms, business logic flaws, and insecure direct object references (IDORs).

Whether you're an OSCP holder wanting to specialize in web attacks or a developer looking to understand the offensive mindset, this course provides the definitive, hands-on training for web pentesting.

Includes 10 Practice Exam. Map the app. Find the flaw. Demonstrate the impact.

If you're ready to move beyond automated scans and become the human expert who can systematically break down a web application's defenses, this is your assessment plan.

comptiasecurityxcas-00517-hourexpert-lev.human_name: EXPERT CompTIA SecurityX 17-HOUR Certification with 10 Practice Exams
comptiasecurityxcas-00517-hourexpert-lev.description_text:
You've mastered the tools and you understand the threats. Now it's time to lead the strategy. This EXPERT-level program is for the senior professional who designs, architects, and manages an entire enterprise security program.

Master the strategic principles of cybersecurity leadership, learning to integrate risk management, compliance, and security architecture into a cohesive, enterprise-wide security posture.

✅ Design and implement comprehensive security governance frameworks and lead enterprise-wide risk management initiatives.

✅ Architect secure, resilient enterprise networks and cloud/hybrid environments, integrating security throughout the design.

✅ Develop and lead a mature security operations program, including advanced threat intelligence and incident response strategies.

✅ Analyze industry trends and translate technical data into business risk intelligence to guide executive decisions.

If you have extensive experience in security operations, engineering, or analysis, this course provides the strategic framework to bridge the gap between technical mastery and executive-level security leadership.

Includes 17+ hours of expert instruction and 10 full-length practice exams. Move beyond tactics. Master security strategy.

If you're ready to prove you have the vision and expertise to lead an enterprise security program, this is your architectural master plan.

databricks_sparkdeveloper_10practiceexam.human_name: Databricks Certified Apache Spark Developer Exam Preparation with 10 Practice Exams
databricks_sparkdeveloper_10practiceexam.description_text:
Apache Spark is the engine behind a massive amount of data processing, and the Databricks Spark Developer certification tests whether you really understand how it works.

This course goes through all seven exam sections so there are no gaps in your preparation.

► Spark Architecture, SQL, and DataFrame API development

► Troubleshoot and tune DataFrame applications

► Work with Structured Streaming and Spark Connect

► Use Pandas API on Spark for familiar data workflows

✔️ Lifetime access to all modules

✔️ 10 practice exams with unlimited attempts

Spark knowledge is a valuable asset in data engineering, and this certification backs it up with a credential from Databricks.

Get Spark certified. Start your prep today.

lpic1_linuxadministrator_10practiceexams.human_name: LPIC-1 Certification: Linux Administrator with 10 Practice Exams
lpic1_linuxadministrator_10practiceexams.description_text:
From the world's supercomputers to the cloud and from web servers to smart devices, Linux is everywhere. Isn't it time you learned how to command it?

This course gives you the essential, hands-on skills to confidently work from the command line, perform real-world system administration tasks, and build a solid foundation for a career in tech.

✅ Master the Linux command line, manage file systems, and understand the core system architecture.

✅ Learn to install software, write simple shell scripts, and manage running system processes.

✅ Confidently manage user accounts, groups, and file permissions in a multi-user environment.

✅ Configure basic network settings and understand essential security and system services.

Whether you're aiming to become a systems administrator or a developer who needs to work in a Linux environment, this course builds the vendor-neutral skills that modern tech roles require.

Includes 10 full-length practice exams. Build your command-line muscle. Test your knowledge.

If you're ready to stop being intimidated by the terminal and start your journey to Linux mastery—this is your launchpad.

csslp_securelifecyclecertification_10pra.human_name: CSSLP: Certified Secure Software Lifecycle Professional with 10 Practice Exams
csslp_securelifecyclecertification_10pra.description_text:
Dive into comprehensive, practical preparation for the Certified Secure Software Lifecycle Professional (CSSLP) exam, covering all essential objectives for integrating security into software design, development, and deployment.

✅ Master Secure Software Fundamentals – Understand core security principles and their role in modern development.

✅ Integrate Security into the SDLC – Apply secure practices in planning, design, development, testing, and deployment.

✅ Define and Implement Secure Requirements – Document and enforce security standards from the ground up.

✅ Architect & Build Secure Software – Design resilient systems and write code that mitigates vulnerabilities.

✅ Test & Validate Security – Perform thorough testing to identify, analyze, and remediate risks early.

✅ Secure Deployment & Maintenance – Operate and maintain secure applications in production environments.

✅ Protect the Software Supply Chain – Reduce third-party and dependency risks.

Includes 10 FREE full-length practice exams. Build hands-on skills and test your readiness for the real CSSLP exam.

Limited spots! Enroll now.

osed_offsecexpertdeveloper_10practiceexa.human_name: OffSec Expert Developer Certification (OSED) with 10 Practice Exams
osed_offsecexpertdeveloper_10practiceexa.description_text:
A simple buffer overflow is a solved problem. But what do you do when faced with ASLR, DEP, and other modern memory protections? This is where true exploit development begins.

This elite program dives deep into the art of Windows exploit development, teaching you to bypass modern memory protections, write custom shellcode, and turn complex vulnerabilities into reliable code execution.

✅ Master techniques to bypass Data Execution Prevention (DEP) using sophisticated Return-Oriented Programming (ROP) chains.

✅ Learn to defeat Address Space Layout Randomization (ASLR) through memory leaks and information disclosure vulnerabilities.

✅ Write position-independent shellcode from scratch to overcome character restrictions and environmental constraints.

✅ Explore advanced 32-bit and 64-bit exploit creation, including structured exception handler (SEH) overwrites.

If you've mastered the art of penetration testing and want to go deeper than ever before, this course represents the pinnacle of offensive training, focusing purely on the craft of exploit creation.

Includes 10 practice exams. Master the debugger. Control the execution flow.

If you're ready to stop using exploits and start creating them—this is your disassembler.

comptia_cloudessentialsplus_10practiceex.human_name: CompTIA Cloud Essentials+ Exam Preparation with 10 Practice Exams
comptia_cloudessentialsplus_10practiceex.description_text:
The cloud isn't just for technologists anymore—it's the foundation of modern business strategy. This program teaches you to speak the language of the cloud, enabling you to make informed, strategic business decisions.

Gain a clear, vendor-neutral understanding of cloud computing principles, focusing on the business value, financial impact, and key governance and risk management concepts.

✅ Understand the core concepts of cloud computing, including deployment models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) and their business use cases.

✅ Explore the business and financial implications of moving to the cloud, including concepts like OpEx vs. CapEx.

✅ Learn about the operational aspects of the cloud, from service level agreements (SLAs) to key migration considerations.

✅ Grasp the fundamentals of cloud governance, risk management, compliance, and security from a management perspective.

Whether you are a manager making cloud decisions, a sales professional selling cloud services, or an IT professional needing the business context, this course provides the essential, foundational perspective.

Includes 10 full-length practice exams. Solidify your understanding of cloud business principles. Prepare with confidence.

If you're ready to contribute to your organization's cloud strategy and demonstrate your understanding of modern IT from a business perspective, this is your essential briefing.

lpic2_linuxengineer_10practiceexams.human_name: LPIC-2 Certification: Linux Engineer with 10 Practice Exams
lpic2_linuxengineer_10practiceexams.description_text:
You know how to administer a Linux system. Now it's time to engineer one. Go beyond daily tasks and learn to design and manage complex, mission-critical Linux infrastructure.

This advanced program dives deep into Linux systems engineering, covering kernel management, advanced storage, and the configuration of essential network services that power the enterprise.

✅ Perform advanced system administration, including Linux kernel management, system startup, and performance tuning.

✅ Configure and manage advanced storage solutions like RAID, LVM, and iSCSI for optimal performance and resilience.

✅ Master advanced network configuration, client management (DHCP, LDAP), and domain name resolution (DNS).

✅ Configure and secure critical network services, including web servers, file sharing (Samba, NFS), and email relays.

If you've mastered the fundamentals of Linux administration, this course is your pathway to a senior role, providing the deep technical knowledge needed to manage mixed-network environments at scale.

Includes 10 full-length practice exams. Deepen your systems knowledge. Engineer with confidence.

If you're ready to move from managing systems to architecting them and becoming an indispensable Linux expert—this is your engineering schematic.

nvidia-certifiedassociate_aiinfrastructu.human_name: NVIDIA-Certified Associate: AI Infrastructure and Operations (NCA-AIIO) with 10 Practice Exams
nvidia-certifiedassociate_aiinfrastructu.description_text:
Behind every AI application is infrastructure that needs to be built, managed, and kept running.

This course prepares you for the NCA-AIIO certification exam across all three of its core domains.

You'll cover essential AI knowledge, the infrastructure that supports AI systems, and the operational practices that keep them functioning reliably.

✅ Essential AI knowledge and foundational concepts.

✅ AI infrastructure design and components.

✅ AI operations and system management.

A straightforward exam prep course for the NCA-AIIO certification.

✔️ Lifetime access to all modules.

✔️ 10 graded practice exams with unlimited attempts.


Build the knowledge to keep AI systems running the right way.

oswp_offsecwirelessprofessional_10practi.human_name: OffSec Wireless Professional (OSWP) with 10 Practice Exams
oswp_offsecwirelessprofessional_10practi.description_text:
Wireless networks are a common feature of modern enterprise environments, each presenting a unique attack surface. This program explores the methodologies used to assess their security.

This program provides a focused overview of common wireless security protocols and the techniques used to identify and analyze their potential weaknesses.

✅ Review the fundamentals of 802.11 networking and the various wireless security standards.

✅ Discuss techniques for capturing and analyzing wireless network traffic to gather information.

✅ Cover common vulnerabilities and misconfigurations found in wireless network implementations.

✅ Explore the tools and processes involved in conducting a wireless security audit.

This program is designed for security professionals and network administrators who wish to gain a deeper understanding of wireless network security assessment.

Includes 10 Practice Exams. Review key concepts. Test your understanding of the material.

For individuals seeking a structured approach to the specific challenges of wireless network security, this course provides a focused path for study.

osir_offsecincidentresponder_10practicee.human_name: OffSec Incident Responder (OSIR) Certification with 10 Practice Exams
osir_offsecincidentresponder_10practicee.description_text:
The breach has happened. The clock is ticking. Every decision matters. The OffSec Incident Responder is trained to take control of the chaos, contain the threat, and restore order under pressure.

Master the technical workflow for incident response, from initial analysis and containment to threat eradication and post-incident recovery, all with an OffSec, adversary-aware perspective.

✅ Learn to rapidly analyze live systems and network data to identify malicious activity and determine the scope of a breach.

✅ Explore effective technical strategies for containing an active threat, isolating compromised systems, and preventing further lateral movement.

✅ Master the process of eradicating an adversary from the network and recovering systems to a secure, operational state.

✅ Understand and apply principles of live digital forensics to collect critical evidence during an active response.

This program is designed for cybersecurity practitioners on the front lines, including SOC analysts, system administrators, and CSIRT members who are responsible for responding to security incidents.

Includes 10 Practice Exam. Analyze the attack. Contain the damage. Take back the network.

In a crisis, some people run from the fire. The Incident Responder runs towards it. If you're ready to be the expert who brings order to chaos, this is your playbook.

osep_offsecexperiencedpentester_10practi.human_name: OffSec Experienced Pentester Certification (OSEP) with 10 Practice Exams
osep_offsecexperiencedpentester_10practi.description_text:
Finding vulnerabilities is one thing. But what happens when you face a hardened network with modern defenses, custom applications, and vigilant defenders? That's where true tradecraft begins.

This advanced course teaches you to think like a persistent adversary by mastering the art of defense evasion, custom payload creation, and lateral movement in highly secured corporate environments.

✅ Master techniques to bypass antivirus (AV) and application whitelisting solutions like AppLocker.

✅ Learn advanced lateral movement and credential abuse techniques to navigate fully patched networks.

✅ Develop custom tooling and modify public exploits to succeed where off-the-shelf tools fail.

✅ Explore sophisticated client-side attacks, process injection methods, and stealthy command-and-control tactics.

If you're ready to move beyond the ""Try Harder"" mindset into the realm of ""Think Smarter,"" this course bridges the gap between traditional pentesting and advanced adversary simulation.

Includes 10 free exams. Refine your tradecraft. Execute with stealth.

If you're ready to stop being stopped by modern defenses and think like a true adversary—this is your operator's manual.

cybersecurityarchitectexpert_microsoftce.human_name: Microsoft Certified: Cybersecurity Architect Expert with 10 Practice Exams
cybersecurityarchitectexpert_microsoftce.description_text:
Modern enterprises face increasingly sophisticated threats, demanding security professionals who can architect solutions that scale and adapt. This course develops your ability to design advanced, integrated security frameworks that protect organizations across cloud, hybrid, and on-premises environments.

You’ll work through high-impact scenarios that mirror real-world challenges, learning how to translate business requirements into actionable security strategies while balancing performance, compliance, and cost.

✅ Design and implement end-to-end security strategies aligned with business objectives

✅ Integrate Microsoft security solutions across identity, data, applications, and infrastructure

✅ Address regulatory and compliance requirements while maintaining operational efficiency

✅ Lead cross-functional security initiatives and establish governance for enterprise environments

Built for experienced professionals aiming to earn the Microsoft Certified: Cybersecurity Architect Expert (SC-100) credential, this program also equips you to lead security planning, decision-making, and implementation within complex enterprise systems.

Includes 10 full-length practice exams. Validate your expertise and prepare with confidence.

Step into the role of a cybersecurity architect and gain the advanced skills to design strategies that safeguard organizations at scale.

cissp_informationsystemssecuritypro_10pr.human_name: CISSP: Certified Information Systems Security Professional with 10 Practice Exams
cissp_informationsystemssecuritypro_10pr.description_text:
Technical skills can only take you so far. To truly lead in cybersecurity, you need to speak the language of risk, policy, and business alignment.

This definitive program helps you develop the broad, management-level perspective required to design, engineer, and manage a complete information security program for any organization.

✅ Master the core principles of security governance, risk management, and compliance frameworks

✅ Understand the fundamentals of security architecture, engineering, and cryptography

✅ Grasp the key concepts of Identity and Access Management (IAM) and securing daily operations

✅ Explore security assessment strategies and how to integrate security into the software development lifecycle (SDLC)

Whether you're an aspiring CISO, a security manager, or a senior consultant, this course helps synthesize your hands-on experience into the strategic framework required for the CISSP exam.

Includes comprehensive study materials and full-length practice exams. Learn the concepts. Think like a manager.

If you're ready to earn the gold standard in cybersecurity certification and unlock the next stage of your career—this is your comprehensive briefing.

osda_offsecdefenseanalyst_10practiceexam.human_name: OffSec Defense Analyst (OSDA) Certification with 10 Practice Exams
osda_offsecdefenseanalyst_10practiceexam.description_text:
An attacker's campaign is a series of seemingly unrelated events: a log entry here, a network connection there. The OffSec Defense Analyst is the one who connects the dots. This program teaches you to see the full picture by analyzing the evidence an attacker leaves behind.

Learn to deconstruct cyber-attacks by performing deep analysis of network traffic, endpoint logs, and malware artifacts to identify attacker Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures (TTPs).

✅ Master the art of log analysis, correlating events from various sources like firewalls, web servers, and operating systems to build an attack timeline.

✅ Learn to dissect packet captures (PCAP) to identify malicious communications, command-and-control (C2) channels, and data exfiltration.

✅ Analyze filesystem and memory artifacts from compromised Windows and Linux endpoints to uncover persistence mechanisms and user activity.

✅ Perform basic static and dynamic analysis of malware samples to understand their capabilities and extract critical indicators of compromise (IOCs).

This program is for blue team members, including SOC analysts and junior incident responders, who want to move beyond triaging alerts and develop deep analytical skills.

Includes 10 Practice Exam. Analyze the evidence. Reconstruct the attack. Uncover the truth.

In cybersecurity, knowledge is power. If you're ready to become the analyst who provides that knowledge and turns data into defense, this is your analyst's handbook.

rhce_redhatcertifiedengineer_10practicee.human_name: RHCE: Red Hat Certified Engineer with 10 Practice Exams
rhce_redhatcertifiedengineer_10practicee.description_text:
Managing one server is a task. Managing hundreds is an engineering challenge. The modern Red Hat Certified Engineer solves this challenge with one critical skill: automation.

This advanced program teaches you how to use Ansible to automate the provisioning, configuration, and management of Red Hat Enterprise Linux systems, transforming repetitive tasks into reliable, repeatable playbooks.

✅ Understand core Ansible concepts, from managing inventories and running ad hoc commands to controlling task execution.

✅ Write and manage complex Ansible Playbooks using a wide range of modules, variables, conditions, and loops.

✅ Create and work with Ansible Roles to develop reusable, organized, and shareable automation content.

✅ Use Ansible Vault to manage secrets, work with Jinja2 templates for dynamic configurations, and manage automation at scale.

If you are an RHCSA or an experienced Linux administrator ready for the next challenge, this course is your bridge from hands-on system administration to scalable systems engineering through automation.

Includes 10 full-length practice exams. Develop your Ansible skills. Automate with confidence.

If you're ready to stop managing systems one-by-one and start engineering solutions at scale, this course provides the automation training you need.

databricks_dataengineerpro_10practiceexa.human_name: Databricks Certified Data Engineer Professional Exam Preparation with 10 Practice Exams
databricks_dataengineerpro_10practiceexa.description_text:
The Data Engineer Professional is Databricks' most advanced data engineering certification.

This exam prep course goes deep across all six domains, from Delta Lake internals to testing and deployment, so you're not just familiar with the topics but genuinely prepared for them.

► Master Delta Lake internals and advanced tooling

► Apply advanced data processing and optimization techniques

► Design enterprise-grade data models

► Implement security, governance, monitoring, and deployment

✔️ Lifetime access to all modules

✔️ 10 practice exams with unlimited attempts

This is the certification that sets apart engineers who really know Databricks from those who just use it. Prepare accordingly.

Take on the Professional exam with confidence. Start now.

linux_essentials_10practiceexams.human_name: The Complete Linux Essentials Certification with 10 Practice Exams
linux_essentials_10practiceexams.description_text:
Ready to take your very first step into the world of Linux? This course is designed for the absolute beginner, demystifying the command line and giving you the confidence to start your journey with open-source technology.

Gain a fundamental understanding of the Linux operating system, learning about its history, how it's used in the real world, and how to perform basic tasks using the command line.

✅ Understand the basics of the Linux operating system, its history, and the philosophy of open-source software.

✅ Learn how to navigate the file system, create and manage files, and find your way around the command line.

✅ Work with fundamental commands to view text files, compress data, and get help when you're stuck.

✅ Grasp the basic concepts of users, groups, and file permissions to see how a Linux system works.

Whether you're a student preparing for a tech career, a professional who needs to interact with Linux systems, or simply curious about open-source, this course is your gentle introduction.

Includes 10 full-length practice exams. Reinforce the basic concepts. Build your confidence for the exam.

If you're ready to open the door to one of the most important technologies in the world, your journey starts here.

pythonsoftwarefoundation.description_text:

blenderdragonsculptingcourse.description_text:
Master sculpting by creating the coolest beast on the planet - a dragon.

Ready to make the mother of all Dragons? In this course, you'll create your own awesome dragon from start to finish.

The course is created at a ""real time"" pace, allowing you to follow along and create your dragon at the same time as the instructors without needing to stop and start the video. Nothing is skipped or speeded up, so you get to see the entire workflow.

You also get two, yes two, instructors! Working together, they discuss every step of the process and dig deep into why production artists make certain decisions. These valuable insights will be extremely useful for future projects you undertake.

The course covers blocking out, sculpting, brushes, automatic retopology, textures, painting, lighting and all the steps in between. You’ll learn to rig and pose your dragon to create an impressive final render. And, you’ll create a high poly model to make a great looking game-ready asset.

The course is for people with a basic familiarity with Blender, so if you’re a beginner take one of the other Blender courses in the bundle first.

createanimecharactersinblendercourse.human_name: Create Anime Characters In Blender Course
createanimecharactersinblendercourse.description_text:
Learn to model, rig and animate an anime character in Blender.

And at the same time, discover the more complex aspects of 3D modelling such as topology and edge flow.

In this course, you’ll learn how to model anime characters and develop skills in box modelling techniques.

You’ll make clothing for your characters, and learn basic to intermediate techniques which include rigging the clothing and texturing. These simple, yet effective, techniques will prepare you for more advanced modelling and topology

This course is aimed at intermediate Blender users looking for more advanced techniques and a “stepping stone” course to make the jump from beginner to pro!

You’ll need a reasonable understanding of the blender interface, ideally having gone through one of our other beginner friendly Blender courses in this bundle.

Grab the bundle to level up in Blender and create your own anime characters now!

blendercharactercreatorforvideogamescour.human_name: Blender Character Creator for Video Games Course
blendercharactercreatorforvideogamescour.description_text:
Ready to build jaw-dropping characters in Blender?

This course takes you from total beginner to character artist, guiding you through modelling, sculpting, retopology, texturing and rigging - all in Blender 4.2.

You’ll create game-ready mechs and orcs with armour, clothing and all the detail your projects deserve.

Learn to sculpt muscles, bake textures and rig for posing and animation.

Whether you’re aiming for games, films, or portfolio glory, this course gives you the tools to make characters that truly stand out.

No experience needed - just grab this bundle and bring your creativity.

blender2dspritescourse.description_text:
Can’t draw sprites? Good news - you don’t have to.

This course shows you how to turn 3D Blender character models into crisp, game-ready 2D sprite sheets, tilesets and UI without a drawing tablet or sprite editor in sight.

Using smart shaders, camera setups and Grease Pencil, you’ll nail the look of games like Dead Cells - pixel-perfect character sprites, a fraction of the time. Grab the bundle and see how it’s done.

fromblendertounrealcourse.description_text:
Get your Blender characters into Unreal Engine without the export headaches.

You’ll build a clean, reliable pipeline for rigged characters, animations and static assets - baking textures, building LODs, rigging with Rigify and animating with the Non-Linear Animation Editor.

Export individual character actions that drop straight into Unreal, ready to go.

Perfect for artists and devs building a pro-quality pipeline. Grab the bundle and ditch the broken rigs.

fromblendertounitycourse.description_text:
Get your Blender characters working in Unity - clean, optimised and game-ready.

You’ll build a solid export workflow for characters, props and animations, baking textures, setting up LODs, rigging with Rigify and animating with the Non-Linear Animation Editor.

Export character actions that just work inside Unity, no broken materials or import weirdness.

Perfect for devs and artists ready to bring their own characters into the engine. Grab the bundle and get building.

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

blenderalphabrushpack_skinscales.human_name: Blender Alpha Brush Pack: Skin & Scales
blenderalphabrushpack_skinscales.description_text:
Unleash the Monster Within Your Models with the Ultimate Skin & Scales Blender Alpha Brush Pack!

Ready to infuse your digital creatures with realism that breathes life (and a little bit of fear) into your scenes?

Elevate your sculpting game with our meticulously crafted Blender Monster Skin & Scales Alpha Brush Pack.

Lurking inside this monstrous kit are 70 Alpha Brushes, including Monster Skin Brushes, Organic Brushes, Scale Brushes and Vein Brushes. Plus Alpha Textures and a handy .Blend File.

Whether you're a seasoned pro looking to speed up your workflow or a beginner eager to jumpstart your sculpting journey, this pack is designed to help you carve out high-quality, believable details effortlessly.

blenderlowpolycharacterscourse.description_text:
Create fun, stylised low poly characters for your games, animations and graphics- no experience needed.

You’ll learn to model quirky characters fast, give them personality with unique hairstyles and outfits, then rig and animate them ready for games.

Perfect for beginners who want results without the overwhelm. Grab the bundle and start building characters for your games that pop.

fromblendertogodotcourse.description_text:
Get your Blender characters into Godot without the export chaos.

This course gives you a fast, clean pipeline for fully rigged characters, static props and environments - baking textures, building LODs and exporting in formats that actually behave inside the engine.

Less trial and error, more time making games. Perfect for devs and artists building out their Blender-to-Godot workflow. Grab the bundle and get your characters game-ready.

blenderanimationandriggingcourse.description_text:
Want to create amazing animations, just like you see on your favourite game characters?

In this course, you’ll bring your creations to life and learn how to rig and animate models and characters.

While the course is mainly character focused, the principles and tools you learn can be applied to animate anything in Blender.

By the end of the course you’ll be able to rig and animate characters ready for game engines, or anything else you want to use them for!

The course is Blender 4 compatible, and will be updated if there are any changes to the way things work in Blender 4.1.

So what are you waiting for? Dive in now and start animating!

probabilisticdeeplearning.description_text: Probabilistic Deep Learning is a hands-on guide to the principles that support neural networks. Learn to improve network performance with the right distribution for different data types, and discover Bayesian variants that can state their own uncertainty to increase accuracy. This book provides easy-to-apply code and uses popular frameworks to keep you focused on practical applications.

developers.developer-name: Oliver Dürr, Beate Sick, Elvis Murina

aiagentsandapplications.description_text: This book teaches you to design reliable LLM-powered systems by focusing on the concepts, architectures, and design patterns that will stay stable even as models and APIs change. You‚Äôll learn to structure prompts, compose modular chains, and build RAG pipelines that ingest documents, split them into chunks, embed them, retrieve the right context, and ground answers to elliminate (or vastly reduce) hallucinations.

aiagentsinaction.description_text: In AI Agents in Action, you‚Äôll learn how to build production-ready assistants, multi-agent systems, and behavioral agents. You‚Äôll master the essential parts of an agent, including retrieval-augmented knowledge and memory, while you create multi-agent applications that can use software tools, plan tasks autonomously, and learn from experience. As you explore the many interesting examples, you‚Äôll work with state-of-the-art tools like OpenAI Assistants API, GPT Nexus, LangChain, Prompt Flow, AutoGen, and CrewAI.

datastorytellingwithaltairandai.human_name: Data Storytelling with Altair and AI
datastorytellingwithaltairandai.description_text: Data Storytelling with Altair and AI teaches you how to build enhanced data visualizations using these tools. The book uses hands-on examples to build powerful narratives that can inform, inspire, and motivate. It covers the Altair data visualization library, along with AI techniques like generating text with ChatGPT, creating images with DALL-E, and Python coding with Copilot. You‚Äôll learn by practicing with each interesting data story, from tourist arrivals in Portugal to population growth in the USA to fake news, salmon aquaculture, and more.

deeplearningpatternsandpractices.description_text: Deep Learning Patterns and Practices is a deep dive into building successful deep learning applications. You‚Äôll save hours of trial-and-error by applying proven patterns and practices to your own projects. Tested code samples, real-world examples, and a brilliant narrative style make even complex concepts simple and engaging. Along the way, you‚Äôll get tips for deploying, testing, and maintaining your projects.

evolutionarydeeplearning.description_text: Evolutionary Deep Learning introduces evolutionary computation (EC) and gives you a toolbox of techniques you can apply throughout the deep learning pipeline. Discover genetic algorithms and EC approaches to network topology, generative modeling, reinforcement learning, and more! Interactive Colab notebooks give you an opportunity to experiment as you explore.

aipoweredsearch.description_text: AI-Powered Search teaches you to create a search that understands natural language and improves automatically the more it is used. As you work through dozens of interesting and relevant examples, you‚Äôll learn powerful AI-based techniques like semantic search on embeddings, question answering powered by LLMs, real-time personalization, and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG).

developers.developer-name: Trey Grainger, Doug Turnbull, Max Irwin

howlargelanguagemodelswork.description_text: How Large Language Models Work takes you inside an LLM, showing step-by-step how a natural language prompt becomes a clear, readable text completion. Written in plain language, you‚Äôll learn how LLMs are created, why they make errors, and how you can design reliable AI solutions. Along the way, you‚Äôll learn how LLMs ‚Äúthink,‚Äù how to design LLM-powered applications like agents and Q&A systems, and how to navigate the ethical, legal, and security issues.

developers.developer-name: Edward Raff, Drew Farris and Stella Biderman for Booz Allen Hamilton

grokkingaialgorithmssecondedition.description_text: Everything you‚Äôll learn in this powerfully simple book is reinforced through engaging, end-to-end projects‚Äîfrom solving mazes with search algorithms to navigating a car through a crowded parking lot with reinforcement learning. Plus, this second edition has been thoroughly revised with fresh chapters exploring the core algorithms of LLMs and image generation models.

introductiontogenerativeaisecondedition.human_name: Introduction to Generative AI, Second Edition
introductiontogenerativeaisecondedition.description_text: Introduction to Generative AI, Second Edition is a completely revised and updated guide to the capabilities, risks, and limitations of generative AI. You‚Äôll understand the latest innovations in AI, AI agents, multimodal training, reasoning models, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and more. Along the way, you‚Äôll explore how AI is impacting the world, with an expert-level look at AI in industry, education, and society.

causalai.description_text: Causal AI introduces the tools, techniques, and algorithms of causal reasoning for machine learning. This unique book masterfully blends Bayesian and probabilistic approaches to causal inference with practical hands-on examples in Python. Along the way, you‚Äôll learn to integrate causal assumptions into deep learning architectures, including reinforcement learning and large language models. You‚Äôll also use PyTorch, Pyro, and other ML libraries to scale up causal inference.

effectiveconversationalai.description_text: Effective Conversational AI teaches you how to build great chatbots that perform reliably even at enterprise scale. In it, you‚Äôll learn how to clarify user intent using LLMs, respond accurately to unanticipated input, and use Retrieval Augmented Generation to keep responses up to date. Along the way, you‚Äôll discover how to establish a feedback loop for continuous quality improvement and master techniques to integrate GenAI safely into conventional chatbot designs.

developers.developer-name: Andrew Freed, Cari Jacobs, Eniko Rozsa

grokkingdeeplearning.description_text: Grokking Deep Learning teaches you to build deep learning neural networks from scratch! In his engaging style, seasoned deep learning expert Andrew Trask shows you the science under the hood, so you grok for yourself every detail of training neural networks. Using only Python and its math-supporting library, NumPy, you‚Äôll train your own neural networks to see and understand images, translate text into different languages, and even write like Shakespeare! When you‚Äôre done, you‚Äôll be fully prepared to move on to mastering deep learning frameworks.

learngenerativeaiwithpytorch.description_text: Learn Generative AI with PyTorch introduces the underlying mechanics of generative AI by helping you build your own working AI models. You‚Äôll begin by creating simple images using a GAN, and then progress to writing a language translation transformer line-by-line. As you work through the fun and fascinating projects, you‚Äôll train models to create anime images, write like Hemingway, make music like Mozart, and more. You just need Python and a few machine learning basics to get started. You‚Äôll learn the rest as you go!

deeplearningwithrthirdedition.human_name: Deep Learning with R, Third Edition
deeplearningwithrthirdedition.description_text: Deep Learning with R, Third Edition gets you up to speed with the current state of deep learning practice. Using Keras 3 with R, you‚Äôll build and train neural networks from scratch, work with transformers, fine-tune pretrained models and explore large language models and diffusion-based image generation. By following carefully constructed examples that build insight step-by-step, you‚Äôll develop a deep understanding of why these models work‚Äînot just how to use them.

deeplearningwithpytorchsecondedition.human_name: Deep Learning with PyTorch, Second Edition
deeplearningwithpytorchsecondedition.description_text: Deep Learning with PyTorch, Second Edition shows you how to build neural network models using the latest version of PyTorch. Clear explanations and practical projects help you master the fundamentals and explore advanced architectures including transformers and LLMs. Along the way you‚Äôll learn techniques for training using augmented data, improving model architecture, and fine tuning.

developers.developer-name: Howard Huang, Eli Stevens, Luca Antiga, Thomas Viehmann

generativeaiinaction.description_text: Generative AI in Action presents concrete examples, insights, and techniques for using LLMs and other modern AI technologies successfully and safely. In it, you‚Äôll find practical approaches for incorporating AI into marketing, software development, business report generation, data storytelling, and other typically-human tasks. You‚Äôll explore the emerging patterns for GenAI apps, master best practices for prompt engineering, and learn how to address hallucination, high operating costs, the rapid pace of change and other common problems.

buildai-enhancedwebapps.description_text: This accessible book shows you how to ship real AI features‚Äînot just toy demos‚Äîusing a JavaScript stack you already know: React for UI, Next.js for backend integration, and the Vercel AI SDK to connect to LLMs like Gemini and GPT. In it, you‚Äôll acquire the skills you need to complete two portfolio-ready projects: a voice-based interview assistant and a RAG-powered corporate knowledge system. You‚Äôll also learn how to design workflows that balance latency, cost, and UX and implement responsible guardrails for security, quality control, hallucinations, and bias.

insideai.description_text: Inside AI provides a clear-headed overview of modern artificial intelligence, including the recent advances of Generative AI and Large Language Models. Its accessible and jargon-free explanations of leading AI techniques showcase how AI delivers tangible advantages to businesses. Both inspiring and practical, this book provides a proven framework for developing successful AI applications.

mathandarchitecturesofdeeplearningmeap.human_name: Math and Architectures of Deep Learning
mathandarchitecturesofdeeplearningmeap.description_text: Math and Architectures of Deep Learning teaches the math, theory, and programming principles of deep learning models laid out side by side, and then puts them into practice with well-annotated Python code. You‚Äôll progress from algebra, calculus, and statistics all the way to state-of-the-art DL architectures taken from the latest research.

learnai-assistedpythonprogrammingseconde.human_name: Learn AI-Assisted Python Programming, Second Edition
learnai-assistedpythonprogrammingseconde.description_text: This book shows you how to create and improve Python programs using AI‚Äîeven if you‚Äôve never written a line of computer code before. Spend less time on the slow, low-level programming details and instead learn how an AI assistant can bring your ideas to life immediately. As you go, you‚Äôll even learn enough of the Python language to understand and improve what your AI assistant creates.

aiforeverydayit.description_text: AI for Everyday IT shows you exactly how AI can transform support desk operations, root cause analysis, disaster recovery planning‚Äîeven writing professional emails when you‚Äôre too furious to be nice! This instantly-useful guide has time-saving techniques for all IT pros‚Äîfrom devs and DBAs to technical writers and product managers. Each relatable example is fully illustrated with the prompts and problem formulation strategies, along with interesting insights and anecdotes from authors Chrissy Lemaire and Brandon Abshire.

codingwithai.description_text: Coding with AI shows you how to gain massive benefits from a powerful array of AI-driven development tools and techniques. And it shares the insights and methods you need to use them effectively in professional projects. Following realistic examples, you‚Äôll learn AI coding for database integration, designing a UI, and establishing an automated testing suite. You‚Äôll even vibe code a game‚Äîbut only after you‚Äôve built a rock-solid foundation.

deeplearningwithjax.description_text: Deep Learning with JAX teaches you to build effective neural networks with JAX. In this example-rich book, you‚Äôll discover how JAX‚Äôs unique features help you tackle important deep learning performance challenges, like distributing computations across a cluster of TPUs. You‚Äôll put the library into action as you create an image classification tool, an image filter application, and other realistic projects. The nicely-annotated code listings demonstrate how JAX‚Äôs functional programming mindset improves composability and parallelization.

feedingamerica.description_text: Feeding America is a nationwide network of 200 food banks that leads the fight against hunger in the United States. Together, we provide food to more than 37 million people through 61,000 food pantries, soup kitchens, and shelters in communities across America. Feeding America also supports programs that improve food security among the people we serve; educates the public about the problem of hunger; and advocates for legislation that protects people from going hungry. Individuals, charities, businesses and government all have a role in ending hunger. Donate. Volunteer. Advocate. Educate. Together we can solve hunger. Visit http://www.feedingamerica.org/. Find us on Facebook at www.facebook.com/FeedingAmerica or follow us on Twitter at www.twitter.com/FeedingAmerica

buildalargelanguagemodelfromscratch.human_name: Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)
buildalargelanguagemodelfromscratch.description_text: Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch) is a practical and eminently-satisfying hands-on journey into the foundations of generative AI. Without relying on any existing LLM libraries, you‚Äôll code a base model, evolve it into a text classifier, and ultimately create a chatbot that can follow your conversational instructions. And you‚Äôll really understand it because you built it yourself!

deeplearningwithpythonthirdedition.human_name: Deep Learning with Python, Third Edition
deeplearningwithpythonthirdedition.description_text: Deep Learning with Python, Third Edition makes the concepts behind deep learning and generative AI understandable and approachable. This complete rewrite of the bestselling original includes fresh chapters on transformers, building your own GPT-like LLM, and generating images with diffusion models. Each chapter introduces practical projects and code examples that build your understanding of deep learning, layer by layer.

deeplearningwithstructureddata.description_text: Deep Learning with Structured Data teaches you powerful data analysis techniques for tabular data and relational databases. Get started using a dataset based on the Toronto transit system. As you work through the book, you‚Äôll learn how easy it is to set up tabular data for deep learning, while solving crucial production concerns like deployment and performance monitoring.
